refined_caption: A rodent is visible in a hospital bed, circled by a red circle. The rodent appears to be in close proximity to a patient's sleeping area.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a rat in one of the hospital beds during my visit. The rodent was clearly visible and seemed to be roaming freely, which is unacceptable in a healthcare setting. This is a serious concern for patient safety and hygiene.
voice_text: There's a rat in one of the hospital beds, it's disgusting and really worrying. I don't think this is a safe place for patients to be.
